item.title: Pali Lesson 19 Feminine Nouns 阴性名词
item.content:encoded:
67.Feminine noun-stems end in ā, i, ī, u, and ū. Examples: kaññā (girl), ratti (night), nadī (river), yāgu (gruel), vadhū (woman).
67.阴性名词词干以 ā、i、ī、u 和 ū 结尾。例如：kaññā（女孩）、ratti（夜晚）、nadī（河流）、yāgu（幼虫）、vadhū（女人）。

Nominative Case : In Nominative Singular all these nouns remain unchanged.
主格：在单数主格中，所有这些名词保持不变。

In Vocative Singular the final 'ā' of the stem is changed into 'e' as kaññe. But there are exceptions as: 'amma' (Vocative Singular of 'ammā', mother). The final long vowels become short in Vocative Singular, e.g. nadi, vadhu.
在呼格单数中，词干最后的“ā”变为“e”作为 kaññe。但也有例外：“amma”（“ammā”的呼格单数，母亲）。最后的长元音在呼格单数中变短，例如nadi, vadhu。

In Accusative Singular 'ṃ' is added to all stems and before it the long vowel becomes short: kaññaṃ, rattiṃ, nadiṃ, yāguṃ, vadhuṃ.

在宾格单数“ṃ”被添加到所有词干之前，长元音变短：kaññaṃ，rattiṃ，nadiṃ，yāguṃ，vadhuṃ。

68. Nominative, Vocative and Accusative plurals.
68.主格、呼格和宾格复数

There are two plural forms, in one the final vowel becomes long, and in the other '-yo' is added to the stem. Before the ending -yo long ī and ū become short: rattī, rattiyo, nadī, nadiyo, yāgū, yāguyo, vadhū, vadhuyo, kaññā, kaññāyo.
有两种复数形式，一种是最后的元音变长，另一种是“-yo”添加到词干上。在词尾 -yo之前，长ī 和 ū 变短：rattī、rattiyo、nadī、nadiyo、yāgū、yāguyo、vadhū、vadhuyo、kaññā、kaññāyo。

Stem 词干 nominative 主格 vocative Singulars 呼格单数 accusative 宾格 nom., voc., acc.,Plurals 主格、呼格、宾格 复数 English Meaning 中义
kaññā kaññā kaññe kaññaṃ kaññā, kaññāyo girl 女孩
ratti ratti ratti rattiṃ rattī, rattiyo night 夜晚
nadī nadī nadi nadiṃ nadī, nadiyo river 河流
yāgu yāgu yāgu yāguṃ yāgū, yāguyo gruel 稀粥
vadhū vadhū vadhu vadhuṃ vadhū, vadhuyo woman 女人

69.Formation of Feminine Gender
69.阴性性别的形成

In feminine gender the final 'a' of some nouns and adjectives becomes 'ā', and some of others it becomes 'ī'. In a very few nouns the final 'a' or 'i' of the stem becomes '-ānī' as: mātula (uncle); mātulānī (aunt); gahapati (householder); gahapatāni (housewife). The final '-aka' of a noun becomes 'ikā' in feminine.
在阴性中，一些名词和形容词的最后一个“a”变成“ā”，而另一些则变成“ī”。在极少数名词中，词干最后的“a”或“i”变成“-ānī”，如：mātula（叔叔）； mātulānī（阿姨）； gahapati（户主）； gahapatāni（家庭主妇）。名词最后的“-aka”变成阴性的“ikā”。

Masculine 阳性 Feminine 阴性 中义
（仅辅助理解或记忆）
mānusa (human) mānusī 人
mūsikā (mouse) mūsikā 老鼠
kokila (cuckoo) kokilā 杜鹃（鸟）；布谷鸟
sobhana (beautiful) sobhanā 美丽的
dīgha (long) dīghā 长的
kukkura (dog) kukkurī 狗
kukkuṭa (cock) kukkuṭī 公鸡；雄鸡
mānava (young man) mānavī (young woman) 年轻男人/年轻女人
mātula (uncle) mātulānī (aunt) 叔叔，伯伯/婶婶，伯母
gahapati (master of a house) gahapatānī (mistress of a house) 男主人/女主人；主妇

item.title: Pali Lesson 18 Neuter Nouns 中性名词
item.content:encoded:
• Pali Lesson 18 Netuer Nouns 中性名词
    • Vocabulary 词汇
      • Masculine Nouns 阳性名词
      • Neuter Nouns 中性名词
      • Adjectives 形容词
      • Indeclinables and Adverbs 不定式和副词
      • Verbs 动词
    • Exercises 练习
      • (a) Translate into English（巴译英）
      • (b) Translate into Pali (英译巴)

发音和记忆是相辅相成的
先背过，然后再学语法，那些词汇就已经熟悉于心
不是仅仅理解就可以，你需要一遍又一遍地背诵。

Sandhī 不需要思考太多，只需要每天背诵。
不需要思考，only follow your pronouncation.

Everyday you recite sandhis from begin to the end.

Pali Lesson 18 Netuer Nouns 中性名词

63.Nominative, Vocative and Accusative of Neuter nouns.
63.中性名词的主格、呼格和对格

To the noun-stems ending in 'a', 'ṃ' is added to form their Nominative Singular. Thus the stem 'phala' (fruit) becomes 'phalaṃ' in the Nomin-ative singular.
对于以“a”结尾的名词词干，添加“ṃ”以形成其主格单数。 因此，主格单数词干“phala”（水果）变成“phalam”。

Noun stems ending in other vowels, i, ī, u and ū, remain unchanged.
以其他元音 i、ī、u 和 ū 结尾的名词词干保持不变。

Nouns ending in ī, and ū, are very rare. There are some adjectives ending in 'ī' and 'ū' which play the part of nouns as: sudhī, gotrabhū.
以 ī 和 ū 结尾的名词非常罕见。 有一些以“ī”和“ū”结尾的形容词充当名词，例如：sudhī、gotrabhū。

In the Vocative Singular the short final vowel of the stem remains unchanged and a long vowel is shortened as: phala, aṭṭhi, sudhi, cakkhu, gotrabhu.
在呼格单数中，词干的短尾元音保持不变，长元音缩短为：phala、aṭṭhi、sudhi、cakkhu、gotrabhu。

In the Accusative Singular 'ṃ' is added to every stem, and a long vowel is shortened before 'ṃ' as: phalaṃ, aṭṭhiṃ, sudhiṃ, cakkhuṃ, gotrabhuṃ.
在宾格单数中，每个词干都添加“ṃ”，并且“ṃ”之前的长元音被缩短为：phalam、aṭṭhiṃ、sudhiṃ、cakkhuṃ、gotrabhuṃ。

Stem 词干 Nominative Singular 主格单数 Vocative Singular 呼格单数 Accusative Singular 宾格单数
phala (fruit) 水果 phalaṃ phala phalaṃ
aṭṭhi (bone) 骨头 aṭṭhi aṭṭhi aṭṭhiṃ
sudhī (wise) 智慧的 sudhī sudhi sudhiṃ
cakkhu (eye) 眼 cakkhu cakkhu cakkhuṃ
gotrabhuˉ1gotrabhū^1gotrabhuˉ1 种姓 gotrabhū gotrabhu gotrabhuṃ

64.Plural forms
64.复数

There are two nominative plurals. In one the short vowel becomes long and the long vowel remains unchanged. In the other '-ni' is added to all those forms as: phalā, phalāni, aṭṭhī, aṭṭhīni, sudhī, sudhīni, cakkhū,cakkhūni, gotrabhū, gotrabhūni.

有两个主格复数。 其中，短元音变长，长元音保持不变。 在其他形式中，“-ni”被添加到所有这些形式中：phalā、phalāni、aṭṭhī、aṭṭhīni、sudhī、sudhīni、cakkhū、cakkhūni、gotrabhū、gotrabhūni。

65.Vocative plural is the same as the Nominative plural (of all nouns).
65.呼格复数与主格复数（所有名词）相同。

66.In Accusative plural, the final 'a' of the stem becomes 'e', in one form and the other form is the same as the nominative plural as: phale, phalāni. The Accusative plural of the stems ending in all other vowels is the same as their nominative plural, e.g. aṭṭhī, aṭṭhīni, sudhī, sudhīni, gotrabhū, gotrabhūni.
在宾格复数中，词干的最后一个“a”变成“e”，其中一种形式和另一种形式与主格复数相同：phale、phalāni。 以所有其他元音结尾的词干的宾格复数与其主格复数相同，例如 aṭṭhī、aṭṭhīni、sudhī、sudhīni、gotrabhū、gotrabhūni。

Nominative, Vocative and Accusative Plurals 主格、位格和宾格

Stem 词干 Nominative, Vocative Plurals 主格、呼格复数 Accusative Plurals 宾格复数 Meaning 意思
phala phalā, phalāni phale, phalāni fruit
水果
aṭṭhi aṭṭhī, aṭṭhīni aṭṭhī, aṭṭhīni stone; hard seed
骨；硬种子
sudhī sudhī, sudhīni sudhī, sudhīni wise man
明智的人
cakkhu cakkhū, cakkhūni cakkhū, cakkhūni eye
眼睛
gotrabhū gotrabhū, gotrabhūni gotrabhū, gotrabhūni change-of-lineage (state of consciousness preceding jhāna or path)
改变种姓（进入禅那或道心前心的状态）

Singular forms of other Cases 其他格的单数形式

Instr.
工具格		 phalena aṭṭhinā sudhinā cakkhunā gotrabhunā
Abl.
离格		 phalā aṭṭhinā sudhinā cakkhunā gotrabhunā
phalasmā aṭṭhismā sudhismā cakkhusmā gotrabhusmā
phalamhā aṭṭhimhā sudhimhā cakkhunā gotrabhunā
Dat.
与格		 phalāya aṭṭhino sudhino cakkhuno gotrabhuno
phalassa aṭṭhissa sudhissa cakkhussa gotrabhussa
Gen.
属格(所有格)		 aṭṭhissa
phalassa sudhissa cakkhussa gotrabhussa
aṭṭhino sudhino cakkhuno gotrabhuno
Loc.
位格		 phalasmiṃ
aṭṭhismiṃ sudhismiṃ cakkhusmiṃ gotrahhusmiṃ
phalamhi sudhimhi cakkhumhi gotrabhumhi
phale aṭṭhimhi

Plural forms 复数形式

Instr.
&
Abl.
工具格
&
离格		 phalehi aṭṭhībhi sudhībhi cakkhūbhi gotrabhūbhi
phalebhi aṭṭhīhi sudhīhi cakkhūhi gotrabhūhi
Dat.
&
Gen.
与格
&
属格		 phalānaṃ aṭṭhīnaṃ sudhīnaṃ cakkhūnaṃ gotrabhūnaṃ
Loc.
位格		 phalesu aṭṭhīsu sudhīsu cakkhūsu gotrabhūsu

Note: Optionally 'i' and 'ū' before 'su' become short, e.g. aṭṭhisu, cakkhusu. The adjective 'sudhī' and 'gotrabhū' go together with neuter nouns as: sudhī kulaṃ (wise family), gotrabhū cittaṃ (the gotrabhū conscious-ness), sudhimhi kule (in the wise family), gotrabhumhi cittamhi (in the gotrabhū consciousness).

注意：可以选择将“su”之前的“i”和“ū”缩短，例如 aṭṭhisu，cakkhusu。 形容词“sudhī”和“gotrabhū”与中性名词一起使用，如：sudhī kulaṃ（明智的家庭）、gotrabhū cittaṃ（gotrabhū 意识）、sudhimhi kule（明智的家庭）、gotrabhumhi cittamhi（gotrabhū 意识） 。

Vocabulary 词汇

Masculine Nouns 阳性名词

Pali English 中文
uttarāsaṅga upper robe 上衣
ekaṃsa one shoulder, one side 一个肩膀，一侧
kassaka farmer 农夫
piṇḍapāta alms 施舍物；救济金
dava amusement 嬉笑，嬉戏
mada enjoyment, intoxication 自豪，陶醉，自負
papaṇika merchant 商人
bhoga wealth 财富
Mahānāma a person so known 摩诃男

Neuter Nouns 中性名词

Pali English 中文
āsana seat 座位
pāda foot 脚
viriya effort, endeavour 精進，能源，努力，力量
sota ear 耳朵
bhojana food, meal 食物
kamma, karma deed, action 业、行为
citta mind, consciousness 心，意识
pāmojja joy 高兴；愉快；喜悦
pahāna dispelling, removal 舍离、舍断
maṇḍana adornment 装饰，装饰品
vibhūsana ornament 装饰
bhaya fear 害怕，惊骇
mahatta greatness, prosperity 大；繁荣
arahatta arhatship 阿拉汉
geha, ghara house 房子，住宅
rāga lust 肉欲，执着
dosa hatred 嗔恨
moha delusion 无明（痴）
anta end, side 末端，尽头，目标，顶端
yodha, bhaṭa soldier 军人，战士
rukkha tree 树
sadda sound, noise 声音；噪声
gandha odour 香，气味
sāyaṇha evening 傍晚
dāḷiddiya poverty 贫穷
agāra home 屋，家
anagāriya homelessness 无家
kula family 家族
Jetavana the grove so known 知名的揭达林
vana, arañña forest 森林
saṅgāma war, battlefield 对抗；战争
khetta field 田，小块土地，适当的地方，生产地，建立地
mūla root, foot of a tree 根，钱，现金，脚，底部，起源，因素，基础，开始
avidūra, samipa vicinity 接近的；附近
dvāra door, gate 门，入口
nagara town, city 城镇，城市
rūpa visible form 色，外形
ghāṇa nose 鼻子

Adjectives 形容词

Pali English 中文
dahara young 年轻的
akusala unwholesome, evil, sinful 孽，罪；坏行为；不善的
kusīta lazy, idle 懒惰的，怠惰
alasa lazy, idle 不作事的，懒惰的
daḷidda poor 贫穷
puñña meritorious 福，功德

Indeclinables and Adverbs 不定式和副词

Pali English 中文
nissaṃsayaṃ certainly 确定地
sakkā is able, can 那是可能的
yannuna how good it be! 那该多好啊！
divā in the day time 在白天
sāyaṃ evening 晚上；傍晚

Verbs 动词

Pali pp.
过去分词		 English 中文
ārabhati āraddha makes effort 发勤精进
odahati ohita gives ear to 倾听
paññāpeti paññatta lays down a rule, promulgates, prepares a seat 管理规则，设下规则，使知道，宣布，准备（座位等）
paccāgacchati paccāgata returns 回返，回来
abhivādeti abhivādita pays homage to 弯腰，行礼
hāyati hīna diminishes, decays 低的，劣等的，低级的，可鄙的
mamāyati mamāyita owns, regards as 被执着，珍爱
apaneti apanīta leads away, takes away 取走，除去

Exercises 练习

(a) Translate into English（巴译英）

1.Brāhmaṇo uṭṭhāyāsanā uttarāsaṅgaṃ ekaṃsaṃ karitvā daharānaṃ bhikkhūnaṃ pāde vandi.

lesson18_exa_01.wav

1.The Brahmin, got up from (his) seat, put on one shoulder (his) upper robe and bowed down at the feet of young monks.
1.婆罗门从座起，偏袒上衣于一肩，顶礼于年轻比丘脚下。

Pāḷi English 中文
Brāhmaṇo Brahman 婆罗门
uṭṭhāyāsanā rising from one’s seat 从座位上起来
uttarāsaṅgaṃ upper robe 上衣
ekaṃsaṃ on one shoulder; over one shoulder 在一肩上
karitvā having done 做了...之后
daharānaṃ young; youthful; junior 年轻人
bhikkhūnaṃ monk 比库，僧人
pāde foot 脚，足
vandi paid respect; honoured 礼敬

2.Therā viriyaṃ ārabhanti.
lesson18_exa02.wav
2.The Elders make (an) effort.

2.长老们做出努力。

Pāḷi English 中文
Therā (vinaya) elder; senior monk; monk with ten or more years as a monk 长老；资深僧侣
viriyaṃ effort; energy; might; power 精力；能量
ārabhanti begins; starts; undertakes; arouses oneself (to); makes an effort (to) 开始；努力（去）

3.Te sotaṃ odahanti.

lesson18_exa03.wav

3.They give ear.
3.他们倾听。

Pāḷi English 中文
Te They 他们
sotaṃ ear 耳朵
odahanti (of attention) applies; pays; 给出

4.Bhikkhū bhojanaṃ bhuñjanti.

F3VFvKLZ.wav

4.The monks eat food.
4.僧人们吃东西。

Pāḷi English 中文
Bhikkhū monk 僧人
bhojanaṃ food; meal 食物；餐食
bhuñjanti uses; enjoys 使用；享用

5.Bālā akusalāni kammāni karonti.

wvPvTz0O.wav

5.The foolish commit evil deeds.

5.愚人作恶。

Pāḷi English 中文
Bālā fool; idiot; immature person 愚人
akusalāni unwholesome 不善的
kammāni action; deed; doing 行为；业
karonti does; acts; performs 做；执行

6.Gahapatino cittaṃ pasīdati.

YEFOi0aC.wav

6.He rejoices the householder’s mind.
6.令居士心欢喜。

Pāḷi English 中文
Gahapatino householder; landowner 屋主；地主
cittaṃ mind; heart 心
pasīdati is pleased; is happy; is appeased 高兴; 是快乐的

7.Pāmojjaṃ uppajjati.

yPW4ABkS.wav

7.Joy arises (i.e. br feels joyful).
7.喜悦升起（即 br 感到喜悦）。

Pāḷi English 中文
Pāmojjaṃ joy; happiness; gladness 喜悦
uppajjati appears; arises; takes place 显现；生起

8.Tumhe āvuso Ānanda rāgassa pahānaṃ paññāpetha, dosassa pahānaṃ paññāpetha mohassa pahānaṃ paññāpetha.

ZKMntNJD.wav

8.Friend Ānanda, you promulgate the getting rid of lust, anger and delusion.
8.阿难尊者，您宣示断除贪、嗔、痴。

Pāḷi English 中文
Tumhe you all; you (royal plural) 你
āvuso brother; brothers; friend; friends 兄弟；朋友
Ānanda name of the Buddha's attendant; great disciple of the Buddha 佛陀侍者的名字、佛陀的大弟子
rāgassa desire (for); passion (for); infatuation (with); lust (for); 欲贪
pahānaṃ giving up (of); letting go (of); removal (of); abandoning (of) 弃绝；断除
paññāpetha teaches; preaches; proclaims 教导；宣告
dosassa aversion; ill-will; hate; hatred 嗔恨
mohassa illusion; delusion; hallucination 错见；幻觉

9.Mayaṃ piṇḍapātaṃ bhuñjāma neva davāya, na madāya, na maṇḍanāya, na vibhūsanāya.

r4NHkRlr.wav

9.We eat food not for the sake of amusement, enjoyment, not to bring adornment (to our body), not for ornament (not for beautifying).
9.我们吃食物不是为了娱乐、享受，不是为了装饰（给我们的身体），不是为了装饰（不是为了美化）。

Pāḷi English 中文
Mayaṃ we 我们
piṇḍapātaṃ alms food 布施的食物
bhuñjāma eats; consumes 吃；消耗
neva neither; not 也不；不
davāya for fun; for play; for sport 为了娱乐，为了玩耍
na not 不
madāya for intoxication; for indulgence; (comm) for strength 为了迷醉；为了放纵；为了力量
maṇḍanāya for embellishment; for bulk; for shape 为了装饰；为了形体魁梧
vibhūsanāya for embellishment; for physical appearance 为了装饰；为了外表

10.Natthi bhikkhave paṇḍitato bhayaṃ.

vnGWXjti.wav

10.Monks, there is no fear (danger) from a wise person.
10.比库们，有智慧的人不会有恐惧（危险）。

Pāḷi English 中文
Natthi does not exist; no longer exists 不存在；没有
bhikkhave monks 啊，比库们
paṇḍitato wise; intelligent; astute; learned; knowledgeable; skilled 智慧的
bhayaṃ fear (of); terror (of); fright 害怕；恐怖

11.Pāpaṇiko mahattaṃ pāpuṇāti bhogesu.

CxSOSrsU.wav

11.The merchant attains prosperity in his wealth.
11.商人因财富而繁荣。

Pāḷi English 中文
Pāpaṇiko shopkeeper 店主
mahattaṃ greatness; illustriousness 影响大的; 著名的
pāpuṇāti reaches; arrives (at); comes (to) 达到；达成
bhogesu wealth; possessions; property; 财富；财产

12.Yannūnāhaṃ Ma-hānāmaṃ ekamantaṃ apanetvā dhammaṃ deseyyāmi.

eWAP0Q6u.wav

12.How good would it be if I were to take Mahānāma to one side and expound to him the Dhamma!
12.如果我能将摩诃纳摩带到一旁，为他说法，那该多好啊！

Pāḷi English 中文
Yannūnāhaṃ what if I were to; let me; I shall; perhaps I 如果我..；我应该...
Ma-hānāmaṃ a so know person 摩诃男
ekamantaṃ to one side; aside 一旁；一侧
apanetvā having removed; having taken away 带走
dhammaṃ teaching; discourse; doctrine 教导；开示；教义
deseyyāmi preach (to); teaches (to); explains (to) 向...宣说；向...教导；向...解释

13.Bhikkhū paññattesu āsanesu nisīdiṃsu.

ZPRzr9nB.wav

13.The monks sat down on the prepared seats.
13.比库们在准备好的座位上坐下

Pāḷi English 中文
Bhikkhū monk 比库，僧人
paññattesu ？ ？
āsanesu seat; chair 座位；椅子
nisīdiṃsu sat (on); sat down (in) 坐在..上

14.Akusalaṃ bhikkhave pajahatha, sakkā bhikkhave akusalaṃ pajahituṃ.

fFhIzXzi.wav

14.Dispel, Monks, evil. It can be dispelled, O monks.
14.比库们！驱除邪恶。诸比库，它可以被驱除。

Pāḷi English 中文
Akusalaṃ unwholesome 不善
bhikkhave O, monks 比库们（呼格，称呼）
pajahatha gives up; abandons; lets go (of) 放弃；舍弃
sakkā it is possible 那是可能的
pajahituṃ gives up; abandons; lets go (of) 放弃；舍弃

15.Cakkhūni hāyanti mamāyitāni.

HXRZ0ukp.wav

15.Eyes regarded as one's own come to decay.
15.视如己出的眼睛会腐烂。

Pāḷi English 中文
Cakkhūni eye 眼睛
hāyanti
mamāyitāni taken as mine; possessed; treasured; cherished 视为自己的

(b) Translate into Pali (英译巴)

1.Monks made an attempt to attain Arhatship.
1.僧侣们试图证得阿拉汉果。
1.Bhikkhū arahattaṃ pāpunituṃ viriyaṃ ārabhiṃsu.

XAi7NQ7w.wav

Pāḷi English 中文
Bhikkhū monk 僧人
arahattaṃ enlightenment; awakened state 觉悟；觉醒的状态
pāpunituṃ to reach; to arrive (at); to attain; 证得，达到
viriyaṃ effort; energy 精力
ārabhiṃsu began (to); started (to) 开始

2.The Buddha expounded the doctrine for getting rid of lust, anger and delusion.
佛陀阐述了断除贪、嗔、痴的教义。
2.Buddho rāgassa dosassa mohassa pahānāya dhammaṃ desesi.

TNV-TtV3.wav

Pāḷi English 中文
Buddho Buddha; Awakened One 佛陀；觉醒的人
rāgassa desire (for); passion (for); infatuation (with); lust (for) 欲；执着
dosassa aversion; ill-will; hate; hatred 嗔恨
mohassa illusion; delusion; hallucination 错见；幻觉

3.We went to the house of the general and sat down on the seats that had been prepared.
3.Mayaṃ senānino gehaṃ gantvā paññattesu āsanesu nisīdimhā.

1OJjShPG.wav

3.我们来到将军府，在已经准备好的座位上坐下。

Pāḷi English 中文
Mayaṃ we 我们
senānino general 将军
gehaṃ house; dwelling 房子；住处
gantvā having gone (to); having travelled (to) 已去到
paññattesu prepared; readied; arranged; laid out 准备好的
āsanesu seat; chair; 座位
nisīdimhā sat (on); sat down (in) 坐在...上； 坐下

4.If you become lazy, certainly you will fall into poverty.
4.如果你变得懒惰，你肯定会陷入贫困。
4.Sace tvaṃ kusito (alaso) bhaveyyāsi, nissaṃsayaṃ dāḷiddiyaṃ pāpuneyyāsi (pateyyāsi).

ErmA31_X.wav

Pāḷi English 中文
Sace if 如果
tvaṃ you (subject) 你 （主语）
kusito piece of cloth (part of a monk's robe)
(alaso)
bhaveyyāsi,
nissaṃsayaṃ
dāḷiddiyaṃ
pāpuneyyāsi
(pateyyāsi)

5.How good would it be if I should go forth from home to homelessness.
5.如果我能出家该多好。
5.Yannūnāhaṃ agārasmā anagāriyaṃ pabbajeyyāmi.

Rl44B6M7.wav

Pāḷi English 中文
Yannūnāhaṃ
agārasmā
anagāriyaṃ
pabbajeyyāmi

6.They gave car to hear the teaching of the Buddha.
6.他们送车去听佛陀的教法。
6.Te Buddhassa dhammaṃ sotuṃ sotaṃ odahiṃsu.

FAZW9kFC.wav

Pāḷi English 中文
Te
Buddhassa
dhammaṃ
sotuṃ
sotaṃ
odahiṃsu

7.Having gone to Jetavana they saw the Buddha and paid homage (to him)
7.到了只园后，他们见到了佛陀并礼敬了他。
7.Te Jetavanaṃ gantvā Buddhaṃ disvā vandiṃsu (abhivādesuṃ).

2dTx4gC8.wav

Pāḷi English 中文
Te
Jetavanaṃ
gantvā
Buddhaṃ
disvā
vandiṃsu
(abhivādesuṃ)

8.Many meritorious deeds were done by the wise family.
8.贤明的家族做了很多功德。
8.Sudhinā kulena bahūni puññani kammāni katāni.

iQgkuQSd.wav

Pāḷi English 中文
Sudhinā
kulena
bahūni
puññani
kammāni
katāni

9.In the battlefield many enemies were killed by the General and (his) soldiers.
9.在战场上，许多敌人被将军和他的士兵杀死。
9.Saṇgāmasmiṃ senāninā ca yodhehi (bhaṭehī) ca bahavo (bahū) arayo (ari) hatā.

-x-pXZ9-.wav

Pāḷi English 中文

ca

(bhaṭehī)
ca

10.The monk went to the forest and sat down at the foot of a tree.
10. 僧人来到森林里，在一棵树下坐下。
10.Bhikkhu araññaṃ (vanaṃ) gantvā rukkhassa mūle nisīdi.

Rw57j_2a.wav

Pāḷi English 中文
Bhikkhu
araññaṃ
(vanaṃ)
gantvā

mūle

11.Then the Buddha stayed in Nigrodharama in the vicinity of the city Kapilavatthu.
11.然后，佛陀住在迦毗罗卫城附近的黑法。
11.Tadā Buddho Kapilavattussa nagarassa avidūre (samīpe) nigrodhārāme vihari (vasi).

bAnuzVu0.wav

Pāḷi English 中文

12.The farmers worked in the field in the daytime and returned to (their) houses in the evening.
12.Kassakā divā khette kammaṃ katvā sāyaṃ (sāyaṇhe) gehāni paccāgacchiṃsu.

13.Many soldiers were standing at the gate of the city.
12.农民们白天在地里干活，晚上就回家。
13.Nagarassa dvāre bahū (bahavo) bhatā (yodhā) aṭṭhaṃsu.

14.We see visible forms with (our) eyes, hear sounds with (our) ears and smell odours with (our) nose.
14.我们用（我们的）眼睛看到可见的形状，用（我们的）耳朵听到声音，用（我们的）鼻子闻到气味。
14.Mayaṃ cakkhūhi rūpāni passāma, sotehi sadde suṇāma ghāṇena gandhe ca ghāyāma.

item.title: 【资料分享】巴利语轻松上路 enjoying Pāḷi
Pali Sandhi rules 巴利连音规则
item.content:encoded:
Pali Sandhi refers to the phonological rules in the Pali language, which is an ancient Indian language closely related to Sanskrit. Sandhi rules govern the changes that occur when two words come together in a sentence. These changes can involve the merging, deletion, or modification of sounds at the word boundaries. Pali Sandhi is important for understanding the correct pronunciation and interpretation of Pali texts. It is a topic of study in the field of Pali linguistics and is often taught in courses on Pali language and literature.

巴利语变音（Pali Sandhi）是指巴利语的音韵规则，巴利语是古印度语。与梵文密切相关的语言。连读规则控制着两个词出现时发生的变化一起造句。这些更改可能涉及声音的合并、删除或修改在单词边界处。巴利语连读对于理解正确的发音和理解非常重要。巴利文经典的解释。它是巴利语言学领域的一个研究课题，并且经常被教授巴利语言和文学课程。

item.title: Pali Lesson 17 Locative Case 第17课 位格
item.content:encoded:
• Pali: Lesson 17 Locative Case 第17课 位格
    • Locative Singular forms 位格单数
    • Locative Plural forms 位格复数
    • Vocabulary 词汇
      • Nouns 名词
      • Indeclinables 无屈哲变化词
      • Adjectives 形容词
      • Verbs 动词
    • Exercises 练习
      • (a) Translate into English: 翻译成英文（译者注：巴译英）

Pali: Lesson 17 Locative Case 第17课 位格

Locative Singular forms 位格单数

Stem 词干 Locative Singular forms 位格单数 Meaning 含义
Buddha Buddhe, Buddhasmiṃ, Buddhamhi Buddha; Awakened One 佛陀；觉醒的人
muni munismiṃ, munimhi monk; sage; seer; hermit; silent sage 僧人；哲人，智者；隐士
senānī senānismiṃ, senānimhi general 将军
garu garusmiṃ, garumhi teacher; guru; esteemed person 老师；大师；受敬重的人
vidu vidusmiṃ, vidumhi wise man; seer 智者
go gavasmiṃ, gāvasmiṃ, gavamhi, gāvamhi cow; cattle 母牛；牛

Locative Plural forms 位格复数

Stem 词干 Locative Plural forms 位格复数 Meaning 含义
Buddha Buddhesu Buddha; Awakened One 佛陀；觉醒的人
muni munisu, munīsu monk; sage; seer; hermit; silent sage 僧人；哲人，智者；隐士
senānī senānīsu general 将军
garu garusu, garūsu teacher; guru; esteemed person 老师；大师；受敬重的人
vidū vidūsu wise man; seer 智者

Vocabulary 词汇

Nouns 名词

Pāḷi English 中文
deva god, rain 天神；雨
ratha chariot, carriage （古代用于战斗或比赛的）双轮敞篷马车；(旧时载客的）四轮马车
giri rock, mountain 石山；高山，山岳
sissa student 学生
sakuṇa bird 鸟
kalaha quarrel 争吵
vijjālaya college 学院，大学
mañca bed 床
kapi, vānara monkey, ape 猴子；类人猿
geṇḍuka, kanduka ball 球

Indeclinables 无屈哲变化词

Indeclinables: (of a noun, pronoun, or adjective in a highly inflected language) having no inflections.
(在一个高度屈折变化的语言中，名词、代词或形容词）无屈哲变化

inflection: a change in the form of a word, especially the ending, according to its grammatical function in a sentence（尤指词尾的）屈折变化

Pāḷi English 中文
pāto morning 早晨
pāto'va (pāto + eva) early morning 清晨
sāyaṃ evening 晚上，傍晚
divā at day time, noon 白天, 中午
bahi outside, out 外部的, 外面
tatra tatra here and there 这里和那里

Adjectives 形容词

Pāḷi English 中文
dhammika righteous 公正的；正直的；正当的
seṭṭha best, highest 最好的

Verbs 动词

Pāḷi English 中文 pp. (past participle 过去分词)
pabbajati goes forth, enters a reigious order 达上成为一名比库 pabbajita
calati moves 移动 calita
pasīdati is pleased, is delighted in 高兴 pasanna
ramati is pleased, is delighted in 高兴 rata
vassati rains, rain falls vuṭṭha
vijjhati shoots 射击 viddha
māpeti builds 建筑，建造 māpita
upapajjati is born in, reaches 出生，达到 upapanna
uppajjati is born 出生 uppanna

Exercises 练习

(a) Translate into English: 翻译成英文（译者注：巴译英）

1.Ahaṃ hiyyo bhātikassa gehe vasitvā ajja pāto’va idhāgacchiṃ.
1.I, having stayed in my brother’s house yesterday, came here early morning today.
1.我昨天住在哥哥家，今天一早就来到了这里。

Pāḷi English 中文
Ahaṃ me 我
hiyyo yesterday 昨天
bhātikassa brother 兄弟
gehe house; dwelling 房子；住处
vasitvā having lived; having stayed; having remained 住在；留在
ajja today, now 今天；现在
pāto’va early morning 清早
idhāgacchiṃ ? ?

2.Idāni thero vihārasmiṃ dhammaṃ deseti, kiṃ tumhe dhammaṃ sotuṃ tahiṃ na gacchatha?
2.The Elder (monk) expounds the Dhamma now in the monastery. Don’t you go there to listen to the Dhamma?
2.长老（和尚）现于寺院说法。 你不去那里听法吗？
dhammaṃ

Pāḷi English 中文
Idāni now; soon; at present 现在
thero (vinaya) elder; senior monk; monk with ten or more years as a monk 长老
vihārasmiṃ monastery 寺院
dhammaṃ Buddha's teachings 佛法
deseti preach (to); teaches (to); explains (to) 教导, 解释
kiṃ ？ ？
tumhe you all; you (royal plural) 你们
dhammaṃ Buddha's teachings 佛法
sotuṃ to hear 听
tahiṃ there; in that place 那里，在那个地方

3.Girisu tatra tatra ahāyo vicaranti.
3. Snakes move about on mountains here and there.
3.蛇在山上到处乱跑。

Pāḷi English 中文
Girisu mountain 高山，山丘
tatra tatra here and there 这里和那里
ahāyo ? ?
vicaranti moves about (in); wanders about (in); roams (in) 四处走动（在）

4.Idāni devo vassati, mā bahi gacchatha.
4.Now rain falls (now it rains), (so) don’t go out.
4.现在下雨了，所以不要出去了。

Pāḷi English 中文
Idāni now, here, at present 现在
devo deity, god 天
vassati rains 下雨
mā do not; may one not; don’t let 不要
bahi externally; outside; outwardly 外面
gacchatha goes; walks; moves; wanders around 去

5.Ajja bahū manussā gāme sannipatiṃsu.
5.Today many men were assembled in the village.
5.今天村里聚集了许多人。

Pāḷi English 中文
Ajja today 今天
bahū many 许多
manussā human being; man; person 人
gāme village 村庄
sannipatiṃsu gathered together 聚集在一起

6.Maggesu rathā calanti.
6.Chariots (cars) move in roads.
6.马车(车)在道路上行驶。

Pāḷi English 中文
Maggesu road; path; track; way 道路
rathā chariot; coach; carriage 马车；车
calanti shakes; wavers; is agitated; is unstable 摇动

7.Viduno Buddhe pasannā.
7.The wise are delighted in the Buddha (pleased with the Buddha).
7.智者对佛陀欢喜。

Pāḷi English 中文
Viduno wise man; seer 智者
Buddhe Buddha; Awakened One 佛陀；觉悟者
pasannā pleased (with); full of faith (in); devoted (to); 对...欢喜

8.Bahū manussā dhamme pasannā dhammaṃ caritvā saggesu uppannā ahesuṃ.
8.Many men delighted in the Dhamma, practiced virtues and were born in heavenly abodes.
许多人对佛法欢喜，修习美德并在天界投生。

Pāḷi English 中文
Bahū many 许多
manussā human being; man; person 人
dhamme the teachings of the Buddha 佛法
pasannā pleased (with); full of faith (in); devoted (to) 对...欢喜
dhammaṃ the teachings of the Buddha 佛法
caritvā having walked; having wandered
saggesu heaven; paradise 天界
uppannā born (in) 出生（在）
ahesuṃ there were; they were

9.Sissā ārāme sannipatitvā kandukehi kīḷiṃsu.
9.Students (pupils) got together in the park and played with balls.
9.学生聚在公园里玩球。

Pāḷi English 中文
Sissā pupil; student 学生
ārāme park; parkland; nature reserve 公园
sannipatitvā having gathered together; having assembled; having met; 聚在一起
kandukehi ball (used in games) ball (used in games) 球（用于游戏中）
kīḷiṃsu played; had fun 玩

10.Gahapatino kumārā vijjālayamhā āgantvā bhutvā idāni mañcesu sayanti.
10.The children of the householder returned from the school, took meal and now are lying on beds.
10.户主的孩子们从学校回来，吃过饭，现在躺在床上。

Pāḷi English 中文
Gahapatino householder 屋主
kumārā youngster; young boy 少年，小男孩
vijjālayamhā
āgantvā having arrived; having come to; having returned 已到达；已来到；已回来
bhutvā having eaten 已吃过
idāni now; soon; at present 现在
mañcesu bed 床
sayanti lies down; rests; sleeps 躺下；休息；睡

item.title: Abhidhamma 89citta 阿毗达摩89心
item.content:encoded:
• 89 Citta (consciousness 心)
    • Lokuttara
    • lokuttara-kusalacittāni - 4
    • lokuttara-vipākacittāni - 4
    • Lokiyacitta - 81
      • kāmāvacaracittāni - 54
        • akusalacittāni - 12
          • lobhamūlacittāni - 8
          • dosamūlacittāni - 2
          • mohamūlacittāni - 2

89 Citta (consciousness 心)

Lokuttara

Supramundane
出世间

Lokuttaracittāni 8
Supramundane Consciousness 8
出世间心 8种

lokuttara-kusalacittāni - 4

Supramundane Wholesome Consciousness 4
出世间善心 4种

1.Sotāpatti-maggacittaṃ.
1.Path consciousness of stream-entry.
1.入流道心

2.Sakadāgāmi-maggacittaṃ.
2.Path consciousness of once-returning.
2.一来道心

3.Anāgāmi-maggacittaṃ.
3. Path consciousness of non-returning.
3.不还道心

4.Arahatta-maggacittañ cā ti.
4.Path consciousness of Arahantship.
4.阿拉汉道心

Imāni cattāri pi lokuttara-kusalacittāni nāma.
These are the four types of supramundane wholesome consciousness.
有4种出世间善心

Imāni: these 这些
cattāri: four 四
pi: only; just even 只有
lokuttara: supramundane 出世间心
kusalacittāni: wholesome consciousness 善心
nāma: [? certainly; truly; for sure 确定地]

lokuttara-vipākacittāni - 4

Supramundane Resultant Consciousness 4
出世间果心 4种

1.Sotāpatti-phalacittaṃ.
1.Fruition consciousness of stream-entry.
1.入流果心

2.Sakadāgāmi-phalacittaṃ
2.Fruition consciousness of once-returning.
2.一来果心

3.Anāgāmi-phalacittaṃ
3.Fruition consciousness of non-returning.
3.不还果心

4.Arahatta-phalacittañ cā ti
4.Fruition-consciousness of Arahantship.
4.阿拉汉果心

Lokiyacitta - 81

Mundane Consciousness 81
世间心 81种

kāmāvacaracittāni - 54

Sense-Sphere Consciousness 54
欲界心 54种

akusalacittāni - 12

Unwholesome Consciousness 12
12 不善心

lobhamūlacittāni - 8

Consciousness rooted in greed
贪根心

1. Somanassasahagataṃ diṭṭhigatasampayuttaṃ asankhārikam ekaṃ.
1.One consciousness, accompanied by joy, associated with wrong view, unprompted.
1.一心，伴随着喜悦，与错误的见解有关联，主动的。

Somanassasahagata: accompanied by joy 伴随着喜悦
somanassa: joy 喜悦（a pleasant mental state 愉悦的精神状态）
sahagata: accompanies 伴随
diṭṭhigatasampayutta: associated with wrong view 与错误的见解关联
asankhārikam: unprompted 主动的

2.Somanassasahagataṃ diṭṭhigatasampayuttaṃ sasankhārikam ekaṃ.
2. One consciousness, accompanied by joy, associated with wrong view, prompted.
2.一心，伴随着喜悦，与错误的见解有关联，被鼓励的。

Somanassasahagata: accompanied by joy 伴随着喜悦
somanassa: joy 喜悦（a pleasant mental state 愉悦的精神状态）
sahagata: accompanies 伴随
diṭṭhigatasampayutta: associated with wrong view 与错误的见解关联
sasankhārikam: prompted 被鼓励的

3.Somanassasahagataṃ diṭṭhigatavippayuttaṃ asankhārikam ekaṃ.
3. One consciousness, accompanied by joy, dissociated from wrong view, unprompted.
3.一心，伴随着喜悦，不与错误的见解有关联，主动的。

Somanassasahagata: accompanied by joy 伴随着喜悦
somanassa: joy 喜悦（a pleasant mental state 愉悦的精神状态）
sahagata: accompanies 伴随
diṭṭhigatavippayutta: disassociated with wrong view 不与错误的见解关联
asankhārikam: unprompted 主动的

4.Somanassasahagataṃ diṭṭhigatavippayuttaṃ sasankhārikam ekaṃ.
4.One consciousness, accompanied by joy, dissociated from wrong view, prompted.
4.一心，伴随着喜悦，不与错误的见解有关联，被鼓励的。

Somanassasahagata: accompanied by joy 伴随着喜悦
somanassa: joy 喜悦（a pleasant mental state 愉悦的精神状态）
sahagata: accompanies 伴随
diṭṭhigatasampayutta: associated with wrong view 不与错误的见解关联
sasankhārikam: prompted 被鼓励的

5.Upekkhāsahagataṃ diṭṭhigatasampayuttaṃ asankhārikam ekaṃ.
5. One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, associated with wrong view, unprompted.
5.一 心，伴随着镇静，与错误的见解有关联，主动的。

Upekkhāsahaga: accompanied by equanimity 伴随着镇静
diṭṭhigatasampayutta: associated with wrong view 不与错误的见解关联
asankhārikam: unprompted 主动的

6.Upekkhāsahagataṃ diṭṭhigatasampayuttaṃ sasankhārikam ekaṃ.
6.One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, associated with wrong view, prompted.
6.一 心，伴随着镇静，与错误的见解有关联，被鼓励的。

Upekkhāsahaga: accompanied by equanimity 伴随着镇静
diṭṭhigatasampayutta: associated with wrong view 不与错误的见解关联
sasankhārikam

7.Upekkhāsahagataṃ diṭṭhigatavippayuttaṃ asankhārikam ekaṃ.
7. One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, dissociated from wrong view, unprompted.
一心，伴随着镇静，与错误的见解不有关联，主动的。

8.Upekkhāsahagataṃ diṭṭhigatavippayuttaṃ sasankhārikam ekan'ti.
8.One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, dissociated from wrong view, prompted.
8.一心，伴随着镇静，与错误的见解不有关联，被鼓励的。

dosamūlacittāni - 2

Consciousness rooted in hatred 2
嗔根心 2种

1. Domanassasahagataṃ paṭighasampayuttaṃ asankhārikam ekaṃ.

  1. One consciousness, accompanied by displeasure, associated with aversion, unprompted.
    一心，伴随着不悦，与厌恶有关联，主动的。

2. Domanassasahagataṃ paṭighasampayuttaṃ sasankhārikam ekan ti.
One consciousness, accompanied by displeasure, associated with aversion, prompted.
一心，伴随着不悦，与厌恶有关联，被鼓励的。

mohamūlacittāni - 2

Consciousness rooted in delusion 2
痴根心 2种

1.Upekkhāsahagataṃ vicikicchāsampayuttam ekaṃ.

  1. One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, associated with doubt.
    一心，伴随着镇静，与疑有关联。

2.Upekkhāsahagataṃ uddhaccasampayuttam ekan ti.
2.One consciousness, accompanied by equanimity, associated with restlessness.
一心，伴随着镇静，与掉举有关联。

注：[?...] 内的内容表示存疑，通常是查不到，或者查到了但存在一词多义的情况，从中选取了自己觉得最接近的词义，但不确定一定是正确的。

item.title: Pali Lesson 16 Dative and Genitive Cases
item.content:encoded:
• Pali: Lesson 16 Dative and Genitive Cases
    • Dative and Gentive plurals
    • Vocabulary
      • Nouns
      • Verbs
      • Adjectives
    • Exercises
      • (a) Translate into English
      • Exercise b 英译巴

Pali: Lesson 16 Dative and Genitive Cases

Stem (词干) Dative singular (与格单数)
muni munino, munissa (to or for the sage) sage: 哲人，智者
senānī senānino, garussa (to or for the general) general: 将军
garu garuno, garussa (to or for the preceptor)
vidū viduno, vidussa (to or for the wise man)
go gavasa, gāvassa (to or for the ox)
Stem (词干) Genitive singular (属格单数)
--- ---
Buddha Buddhassa (of the Buddha, the Buddha's
muni munino, munissa (of the sage, the sage's) sage: 哲人，智者
garu garuno, garussa (of the preceptor, the preceptor's preceptor:导师
vidū viduno, vidussa (of the wise man, the wise man's)

Dative and Gentive plurals

Noun-stem Dative and Genitive plurals
Buddha Buddhānaṃ (to or for the Buddhas, of the Buddhas)
muni muninaṃ (to or for the sages, of the sages)
senānī senānīnaṃ (to or for the generals, of the generals)
garu garūnaṃ (to or for the preceptors, of the preceptors)
vidū vidūnaṃ (to or for the wise man, of the wise man)
go gavaṃ, gunnaṃ, ganaṃ (to or for the oxen, of the oxen) oxen:公牛

Vocabulary

Nouns

aggi (fire)
andhakāra (darkness)
assama (hermitage 隐居处，修道院)
bhūpa (king)
tāpasa (asetic 苦行者)
kāru (carpenter 木工，木匠)
pāsāda (palace 宫殿)
ari (enemy)
pabbata (mountain)
raja-purisa (policeman)
āloka (light 光）
yācaka (beggar 乞丐，叫花子)
amacca (minister 部长，大臣, companion 旅伴，伙伴）
tattha eva (there itself), ind.
(Ind. indenpendent)

Verbs

abhiruhati (climbs up)
pp. abhirūḷha

oruhati (climbs down)
pp. orūḷha

khādati (eats)
pp. khādita

Adjectives

bahu (many);
abhinava (quite new);
nava (new)

Exercises

(a) Translate into English

1.Aggi uṭṭhāya kuṭumbikassa gehaṃ ḍahi.
Fire rose up and burnt the householder's house.
火燃起来了并且烧掉了屋主的房子。

Aggi:fire 火
uṭṭhāya: having risen 已生起
kuṭumbikassa:? family
gehaṃ: a house 一个房子
ḍahi: burnt 烧

2.Mayaṃ ajja isino assamaṃ pabbataṃ abhiruhissāma.
We will today climb up the mountain to see the seer's hermitage.
我们今天将会爬上山去看先知的隐居处。

Mayaṃ: we 我们
ajja: today 今天
isino: seer, sage 先知, 智者
assamaṃ: monastery, hermitage 寺院，修道院
pabbataṃ: mountain; hill 山；山丘，小山

3.Navo setu kārunā kato hoti.
The new bridge has been built by the carpenter.
新的桥已经被木匠建起来了。

Navo: new, fresh 新的，新鲜的
setu: bridge 桥
kārunā: ?
kato: make, built 做，修建
hoti: is, becomes 是，成为

4.Gahapatino gāvo corehi hatā.
The householder's oxen were taken away by thieves.
屋主的牛被贼牵走了。

Gahapatino: householder 屋主
gāvo: cow, cattle 牛
corehi: thief, robber 贼，强盗
hatā: ?

5.Gahapatino ucchavo dhanikena vāṇijena kītā.
The bouscbojder's sugar cane were bought by the rich merchant.
屋主的甘蔗被富有的商人带走了。

Gahapatino: householder 屋主
ucchavo: sugar cane 甘蔗
dhanikena: wealthy man 富有的人
vāṇijena: trader, dealer 交易商，贸易商
kītā: bought, purchased 买，购买

6. Sabbaññunā desito dhammo vihāraṃ gatehi senānino puttehi suto.
The Dhamma expounded by the Omniscient One was heard (listened to) by the general's sons who had gone to monastery.
一切知者所宣说的法，被到寺院的将军的儿子们所听到。

Sabbaññunā: omniscient; all knowing; with complete understanding 一切知者
desito: preached (by); taught (by); explained (by); instructed (by) 被教导;被解释
dhammo: nature, character 自性，法
vihāraṃ: 寺院
gatehi: gone (to), went (for) 去到
senānino: general 将军
puttehi: son, child 儿子，孩子
suto: heard, learned 听到，学到

7.Alagaddena daṭṭho migo tatth'eva patitva mato.
The deer bitten by the snake fell down and died there itself.
The deer bitten by the snake fell down and died there itself.
被蛇咬伤的鹿倒地而死。

Alagaddena: water-snake; poisonous snake 水蛇；毒蛇
daṭṭho: bitten 被咬
migo: deer 鹿
tatth'eva: right there; in that place; on the spot; there and then 就在那
patitvā: having fallen down (from); having fallen off (of); having fallen (onto) 倒下
mato: dead 死

8.Sūdehi gahapatino sevakānaṃ odano pacito.
The rice was cooked by the cooks for the householder's servants.
米饭是由厨师为户主的仆人煮的。

Sūdehi: cook; chef 厨师
gahapatino: householder; landowner 屋主；户主
sevakānaṃ: servant, attendant 仆人，侍者
odano: rice; boiled rice; food 米饭
pacito: cooked 煮的

9.Suriyassa ālokena andhakāro apagato.
The darkness was dispelled (or was gone off) by the sun's light.
黑暗被阳光驱散（或消失）。

Suriyassa: sun; lit. shining 太阳
ālokena: light; brightness 光
andhakāro: darkness; blackness; blindness 黑暗
apagato: without; free (from); with no 驱散

10.Bhūpassa ca kumārānaṃ ca amaccānaṃ ca bahavo abhinavā pāsādā kārūhi katā.
Many new palaces have been built by the carpenters for the King, the princes and ministers.
许多新宫殿已经被木匠为国王、王子和大臣建立起来。

Bhūpassa:
ca: and, both 和
kumārānaṃ: prince 王子
amaccānaṃ: minister 部长；大臣
bahavo: many; much; lots (of) 许多
abhinavā: brand new; fresh 新的
pāsādā: palace 宫殿
kārūhi: did, made 做
katā: done; did; completed 完成

Exercise b 英译巴

1.The ox beaten with a bamboo by the householder's servant ran away.
牛被户主的仆人用竹子打后逃跑了
Go gahapatino sevakena veḷunā pahaṭo apadhāvi.

Go: cow; cattle 牛
gahapatino: householder; landowner 屋主；户主
sevakena: servant, attendant 仆人；侍者
veḷunā: bamboo 竹子
pahaṭo: hit; struck 打；击打
apadhāvi: ?

2.The asetic climbed down (from) the mountain and entered the village for alms.
苦行者从山上下来，进村乞食。
Tāpaso (isi) pabbatamhā orūḷho gāmam pindāya paviṭṭho.

Tāpaso: ascetic; hermit 苦行者，隐士
isi: seer; sage 哲人；智者
pabbatamhā: mountain; hill 山；山丘
orūḷho: descended, climbed down 下来
gāmam: ?
pindāya: ?
paviṭṭho: entered; gone (into) 进入

3.The man having seen the thief that entered the house, went and brought the policeman
那人看到小偷进了屋子，就去把警察带来了。
Puriso gehaṃ paviṭṭhaṃ coraṃ disvā gantvā rājapurise ānesi.

Puriso: man; person 男子；人
gehaṃ: house; dwelling 房子；居住
paviṭṭhaṃ: entered; gone (into) 进入
coraṃ: thief; robber 小偷; 盗贼
disvā: having seen; having understood; having found out 看到
gantvā: having gone (to); having travelled (to) 去到
rājapurise: king’s man; royal servant; police officer 警察
ānesi: brought; took 被带走

4.The householder saw (his) son, fallen from the tree and died, and wept.
户主看见儿子从树上掉下来死了，哭了。
Gahapati rukkhato (rukkhamhā) patitaṃ mataṃ puttaṃ disvā rodi.

Gahapati: householder; landowner 屋主；户主
rukkhato: tree 树
rukkhamhā: tree 树
patitaṃ: fallen (onto); landed (on) 掉落（在...上）
mataṃ: dead 死
puttaṃ: son; child 儿子；孩子
disvā: having seen; having understood; having found 看到
rodi:cried, lamented 哭泣

5.The house bought by the mercant was burnt by his enemies.
商人买的房子被敌人烧毁了。
Vāṇijena kīto geho arīhi daḍḍho.

Vāṇijena: trader; dealer 交易商；贸易商
kīto: bought; purchased; paid for 买了的
geho: house; dwelling 房子；住宅
arīhi: enemy 敌人
daḍḍho: burnt; burnt down; consumed by fire 烧，烧掉，被火摧毁

6.Men go to heaven by means of Dhamma.
人们通过佛法进入天界。
Manussā dhammena saggaṃ

Manussā: human being; man; person 人类，人，人们
dhammena: 佛法
saggaṃ: heaven; paradise 天界；天国

7.Even the heroes were attacked by death.
就连英雄也遭到了死亡的袭击。
Vīrāpi maccunā pahaṭā.

Vīrāpi: ?
maccunā: death 死亡
pahaṭā: hit; struck 打，撞击；打击

8.Alas, the world will perish!
唉，世界就要灭亡了！
Nassati vata loko!

Nassati: perishes; ends; is destroyed; 灭亡；毁灭
vata: oh!; oh no!; oh dear!; wow! （感叹词）唉
loko: world; plane of existence 世界

9.Rice cooked by the cook was eaten by the beggar's dog.
厨师煮的饭被乞丐的狗吃掉了。
Sūdena pacito odano yācakassa sunakhena khādito.

Sūdena: cook; chef 厨师
pacito: cooked 煮的
odano: rice; boiled rice; food; 米饭；煮熟的米饭
yācakassa: beggar; mendicant 乞丐
sunakhena: dog 狗
khādito: eaten; consumed 吃掉

10.The man's oxen were lost (vanihshed).
该男子的牛丢失了（消失）。
Purisassa goṇo naṭṭho.

Purisassa: man; person 男子，人
goṇo: ox; bull 牛，公牛
naṭṭho: lost; perished; destroyed 丢失，丧失

item.title: Pali Lesson 15 excrise 第15课课后作业题
item.content:encoded:
Lesson 15 Excrise 第15课 练习

巴译英：

Exercise a:
1.Ahaṃ hiyyo gāmamhā idhāgato.
I came here yesterday from the village.
我昨天从村庄来到这里。

2.Puriso rukkhamhā patitvā mataṃ puttaṃ disvā rodi.
The man wept after seeing the son that fell from the tree and died.
在看到儿子从树上摔下死亡之后，那个男子悲伤哭泣。

3.Senāpatinā arihi muñcitaṃ bhātikaṃ disvā gahapati ativa tuṭṭho ahosi.
The householder saw the brother saved from enemies by the general and became extremely happy.
屋主看到弟弟被将军从敌人手中解救出来，非常高兴。

  1. Suriyo uggato hoti, tumhe pana idāni pi sayatha.
    The sun has risen, but you are still lying down (lit. even now).
    太阳已经升起，但你还躺着（现在也是）。

  2. Therena anusiṭṭā manussā pāṇātipātā viratā ahesuṃ.
    The men advised by the Thera abstained from killing.
    这些人在长老的建议下放弃杀生。

  3. Te dhammaṃ caritvā saggaṃ gatā.
    They practised the Dhamma and went to heaven.
    他们修习佛法，去到了天界。

  4. Kuhiṃ ṭhito tvaṃ gehaṃ coraṃ passi?
    Where did you stand and see the thief that came to the house?
    你站在哪里看到贼去屋子里的？

  5. Patto hathamhā patiso bhinno ahosi.
    The bowl fell from the hand and was broken.
    钵从手上掉下来摔破了。

  6. Senāninā asinā pahaṭa arayo patitā matā.
    The enemies attacked by the general with (his) sword fell down dead.
    被将军攻击的敌人带着（他的）剑倒地身亡。

  7. Buddho bhikkhāhi ca upāsakehi ca vandito pūjito ca āsi.
    The Buddha was adored and honoured by monks and lay devotees.
    佛陀被出家众和在家信徒喜爱和尊敬。

Exercise b:
1.The rice cooked by the cook was eaten by the servants.
厨师做的饭被服务员吃了。
Sūdena pacito odano sevakehi bhutto.

2.We saw fallen tree.
我们看到倒下的树。
Mayaṃ patitaṃ rukkhaṃ passimhā.

3.Where is the man that has came here?
来这里的那个男人在哪？
Idāni āgato puriso kuhiṃ hoti?

4.The boy ran from here and/fell down there.
男孩从这里跑过来并摔倒在那边。
Dārako ito dhāvitvā tatra patito.

5.Kuto so āgato?
Where has he come from?
他从哪里来？

  1. I saw a deer that had been bitten by a snake and had died.
    我看到一只鹿被蛇咬了然后死了。
    Ahaṃ ahinā daṭṭhaṃ mataṃ migaṃ passiṃ.

7.The man seeing (having seen) his son returned from the village became happy
(glad).
那个男子看到他的儿子从村子回来变得高兴。
Puriso gāmamhā (gāmato) gehamāgataṃ puttaṃ disvā tuṭṭho ahosi.

8.The house built by the carpenter was bought by the house-
holder.
木匠建造的房子被户主买走了。
Kārunā kato geho gahapatinā kīto.

9.The trees cut by the servants fell down.
被仆人砍伐的树木倒下了。
Taravo (rukkhā) sevakehi chinnā patitā.

10.The men who went to the monastery saw the Thera and bowed down.
去到寺院的男子们看到了长老并顶礼。
Vihāraṃ gatā purisā Theraṃ disvā vandiṃsu (abhivādesisuṃ).

11.Where have those men come from?
这些男子从哪里来？
Kuto te manussā āgatā？
